name: Beef Kushisashi
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, blend soy sauce, chopped green onions, sugar, oil, cornstarch, garlic, and grated ginger. Simmer, stirring constantly until thickened (about 1 minute). Allow to cool.
2. Cover and set aside.
3. Slice beef into thin strips measuring approximately 0.25 inches wide and about 4 inches long.
4. Thread the beef onto bamboo or metal skewers, ensuring the meat remains as flat as possible.
5. Brush both sides of each piece of beef with the sauce.
6. Place the skewered beef on a rack in the broiler pan and broil to desired doneness.
Serves: 10
From: Kikkoman recipe booklet
